name: HANCOCK WHITNEY CORP
summary: ORGANIZATION Hancock Whitney Corporation (the Company) is registered with the Federal Reserve as a bank holding company and has elected to be treated as a financial holding company under the Bank Holding Company Act of 1956, as amended. The Company provides comprehensive financial services through its bank subsidiary, Hancock Whitney Bank (the Bank), a Mississippi state bank, and other nonbank affiliates. Our principal executive offices are located at 2510 14 th Street, Gulfport, Mississippi, 39...
